evidence_excerpts: By the end of the lesson, learners will be able to synthesize key concepts from Term 1 by creating a "Heroes of Faith" scrapbook highlighting Biblical figures, African ancestors, and modern organizations.

evidence_excerpts: Brainstorming session to recall "Heroes of Faith" from the three main topics: Biblical figures, African Ancestors, and World Religions/Organizations. The learner identifies and categorizes key figures and organizations studied throughout Term 1. Reviewing Topic 1: Biblical Heroes.; Reviewing Topic 2: Ancestors and Reconciliation.; Reviewing Topic 3: Global Organizations of Service.

evidence_excerpts: Selecting sections for the scrapbook and preparing local materials for assembly. The learner plans the structure and design of a thematic scrapbook. Dividing the scrapbook into three sections.; Choosing titles for each page.; Preparing local materials (banana fibers, cards).
